name: Citrus Poppy Seed Delight
recipeInstructions:
Icing
2 Cups Powdered Sugar -- sifted
2 to 3 Tablespoons Orange Juice
Zest From 1 Orange and 1 Lemon
Cake:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a bundt pan with the nonstick spray. Using an electric mixer, beat together the orange juice, oil and eggs. Add the cake mix to the batter; mix until completely moistened. Continue mixing for 2 minutes at high speed. Fold in the poppy seeds and zest. Pour the batter into the bundt pan. Bake for 30-35 minutes. Invert the cake onto a cake plate and cool completely. Spoon icing over the cake and top with extra zest.
Icing:
Combine all the ingredients and mix well. The icing should be moderately thick. Add more powdered sugar or orange juice until the desired consistency is reached.
